verses.text: Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Tho in. Beelsekpa' inn-ah paisuk in la, tua lai-ah ka thute kong hilh ding hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong beelsekpa' inn-ah ka paisuk leh beel a sek laitak ka va tuakkha hi
Buan tawh a bawl a beel ama khutsungah kisia ahih manin beelsekpa in hoih a sak bangin beel dang khatin a sek pha hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah

“Israel mite aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih beelsekpa' hih bangin note zong hong hih theilo ding ka hi hiam? En un, beelsekpa' khutsunga buan tawh kibangin, Israel mite aw, kei' khutsungah note na om uh hi
Minam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, gam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin botkhia-in, khenkhamin, ka suksiatna ding thu, hun khat peuhpeuh lai-in ka gen khinzo ahi zongin
tua ka gensa minam leh gam a siatna panin a kiheikik leh, ama tungah siatna tun'sak dingin ka sehsa pen ka kisikkik ding a, ka tungsak nawn kei ding hi
Minam khat peuhpeuh ahi a, gam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin lam ding leh phut dingin hun khat peuhpeuh lai-in ka gen khinzo ahi zongin
amah in ka thu hong ngailoin, hoih ka saklohte a bawl teitei leh, ama tungah hoihna bawl ding ka sehsa pen ka kisikkik ding a, ka bawl nawn kei ding hi

Tua ahih manin tu-in, Judah mite leh Jerusalem khuamite' kiangah Topa in a cihin-ah, ‘En un, note' siatna ding ka geel a, note' langkhatah ngimna khat ka nei hi. Na vekpi-un na siatna uh pan kilehkik un la, na omdan uh leh na nasepnate uh bawlpha un,’ va ci in
Amaute in, ‘Tua bang gen kullo hi. Ko' ngimna bangin ka gamta ding uh a, mi khempeuh ama lungsim sia' deihna bangin a gamta ding uh hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi
“Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Minam dangte' lakah hih bang thu a kiza ngei hiam, dong dih un. Keima mituam Israel in a mulkimhuai mahmah na khat a hihzo hi
Lebanon mualtung vuk in susia ngei ahi hiam? Mualtung panin a hong luang a vot kilkel luite kang ngei ahi hiam

Ahih hangin ka mite in kei hong mangngilh khin uh a, milim pasian-te kiangah paknamtui a hal uh hi. Amau' tot ding lampi-ah tuk uh ahih manin a tot ngei uh lampi lui zui nawnloin, lampi lopi a tawn uh hi
Amaute' gam pen a mulkimhuai leh simmawhna tawh a kiphitsan den ding gam a suaksak uh hi. Tua gam a kantan khempeuh mulkim mahmah uh a, lamdangsa-in a lu uh a pei uh hi
Nisuahna lam huih in nin a mutmang bangin a galte uh mai-ah amaute ka thehthang ding hi. Haksatna a tuah ni-un amaute ka nungngat ding a, ka maingat kei ding hi,” hong ci hi.

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hong pai un, Jeremiah sawm ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite a hong hilh dingin siampite ahi zongin, i dot ding mipilte ahi zongin, Pasian' thu a hong gen dingin kamsangte ahi zongin i nei hi. Hong pai un, amah mawhsakin ama thu peuhmah mal khat zong i mang kei ding hi,” hong ci uh hi
Hong en in, Topa aw, keima hong thugennate leh ka galte in keima thu a gennate hong ngai in

Hoihna pen siatna tawh a kituak ding mah ahi hiam? Keimah hong siahna-in gum a to uh hi. Nangma mai-ah kong ding a, amau-a' ding thuhoih kong gen hi. Na hehna amaute tungah na tun'saklohna dingin ka hong ngetnate hong phawk in

Tua ahih manin a tate uh kial tawh puksisak in la, amaute namsau-in sisak in. A zite uh ta neisak kei in la, meigong suaksak in. A pasalte uh pulnatna tawh sisak in la, a tangvalte uh galsungah namsau tawh kithatlum sak in
Amau a thatlum ding galkapte thakhat thu-in paisak in la, amau' innte panin kahna aw kizasak in! Bang hang hiam cih leh ka kiatna dingin gum to uh a, ka khete a awkna dingin thang a hong siah uh hi

Ahih hangin Topa aw, amaute in thah dingin kei a hong sawmna uh nang na thei hi. Amau' khialhnate na maisak kei in la, nangma muhna panin amau' mawhnate phiatmangsak kei in. Nangma mai-ah amaute guallelsak in la, na heh ni mahin hih ek in.
